# 🎯 Quick Reference: AI Mode Shortcuts

## Hashtag Commands (Type in Copilot Chat)

| Command     | Purpose                   | Loads                               |
| ----------- | ------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `#plan`     | Plan new features or apps | `.vscode/prompts/planning.md`       |
| `#debug`    | Systematic debugging      | `.vscode/prompts/debugging.md`      |
| `#review`   | Pre-commit code review    | `.vscode/prompts/code-review.md`    |
| `#ui`       | UI/design consistency     | `.vscode/prompts/ui-consistency.md` |
| `#workflow` | Best practices            | `.vscode/prompts/workflow.md`       |

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Keys                      | Mode        |
| ------------------------- | ----------- |
| `Ctrl+Shift+P` → `Ctrl+P` | Plan Mode   |
| `Ctrl+Shift+P` → `Ctrl+D` | Debug Mode  |
| `Ctrl+Shift+P` → `Ctrl+R` | Review Mode |
| `Ctrl+Shift+P` → `Ctrl+U` | UI Mode     |

## Example Usage

### Planning a new feature:

```
#plan Add a PM2.5 trend chart for the last 30 days
```

### Debugging an issue:

```
#debug The TimeSeriesChart component isn't rendering data correctly
```

### Code review before commit:

```
#review Check my changes to src/app/actions.ts
```

### UI consistency check:

```
#ui Review this new EventCard component for design system compliance
```

---

**Full Guide**: See `.vscode/PLANNING_MODE_SETUP.md`
